n: Instance: The Great Triumph of Mordor and Ordâkh

steps.t: Ulishár stands with you in the back-stage chambers of the performance hall in Emax Dûl.
Satagêra stands by the doorway leading to the stage.
Your big moment has arrived! Run up the stairs on the right side of the stage and stand by the door to the west hallway.
Now is your chance! Slip inside the hallway while the audience is distracted.
Ulishár has joined you in the hallway west of the stage, in the belly of Emax Dûl.
The papers in the Lord's Study may provide the information you seek. Search them and learn what you can!
The papers in the Lord's Study may provide the information you seek. Search them and learn what you can!
Ulishár wishes to speak with you in the Lord's Study.
Take your <rgb=#00FF00>bow</rgb> with the other performers.
You learned what you came for, and should now return to the rooms backstage to wait for the rest of Têrkar's Travellers.
